data.name: Sex Game - Naughty Girls - Episode 4
data.detailed_description:
Enjoy an erotic visual novel featuring two hot women and an engaging sex simulator. Follow their story, get lost in their steamy conversations, and take control by choosing from a variety of positions to bring them to ecstasy.

GAME DESCRIPTION

Juliette and Natalie sneak into an unused doctor's office to play out one of their wild fantasies. A naughty nurse and patient sex game in the right setting.

Control the sex between the two of them.
Follow the 2 sliders and keep the sex going by pressing SPACE or CLICKING THE MOUSE at the right time, to avoid the arousal level to drop or your stamina to run out, and lose the game.
Go through various sex styles and positions, to avoid the arousal level to stop increasing.
All this, in high quality, realistic animations and renderings.

FEATURES

- Image and video gallery, so you can enjoy the animations and renderings.
- HD renders and animations.

data.short_description: Enjoy an erotic visual novel featuring two hot women and an engaging sex simulator. Juliette and Natalie sneak into an unused doctor's office to play out one of their wild fantasies. A naughty nurse and patient sex game in the right setting.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.11+
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
